scenario.name: Basic Sipstone UAC
scenario.send:
INVITE sip:[field0]@[field2];transport=[transport] SIP/2.0 From: sip:[field1]@[field3];tag=[call_number] To: sip:[field0]@[field2] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: [cseq] INVITE Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] Session-Expires: 3600;refresher=uac Min-SE: 600 Call-Info: <sip:10.0.222.133>;method="NOTIFY;Event=telephone-event;Duration=1000" Allow: INVITE,BYE,OPTIONS,CANCEL,ACK,REGISTER,NOTIFY,INFO,REFER,SUBSCRIBE,PRACK,UPDATE,MESSAGE,PUBLISH Content-Length: [len] Max-Forwards: 70 P-Asserted-Identity: <sip:[field1]@[field3]> Contact: "Trunk" <sip:81001001@sbc.com:5060;transport=[transport] Supported: replaces, Content-Type: application/sdp
v=0^M o=2115552011 617614476 2743 IN IP[local_ip_type] [local_ip]^M s=SIP Call RV XT4000^M c=IN IP[media_ip_type] [local_ip]^M b=AS:4096^M t=0 0^M k=key:FCACAD19FA3FD760AA503B706E45E029EA192EF0803CCCF646EF9D41524BF15268B1668BA2AD8736E198E8C9A426BC09BB30C4560C3DCD8E26204CFE449D08D48E4D91CEC236AF54D7789558EC6C15DD0D480DAC5AAB2DB56D3FCAD9B1308BF700098252080DEBD30877DEA849850DFBD0442F2F17C31C745B3C447F2B2AB2FE^M m=audio 3262 RTP/AVP 119 118 117 116 115 114 123 122 120 107 113 112 9 0 8 101^M a=rtpmap:119 G719/48000^M a=fmtp:119 CBR=64000;max-red=0^M a=rtpmap:118 G719/48000^M a=fmtp:118 CBR=48000;max-red=0^M a=rtpmap:117 G719/48000^M a=fmtp:117 CBR=32000;max-red=0^M a=rtpmap:116 G7221/32000^M a=fmtp:116 bitrate=48000^M a=rtpmap:115 G7221/32000^M a=fmtp:115 bitrate=32000^M a=rtpmap:114 G7221/32000^M a=fmtp:114 bitrate=24000^M a=rtpmap:123 MP4A-LATM/90000^M a=fmtp:123 profile-level-id=24;object=23;bitrate=64000^M a=rtpmap:122 MP4A-LATM/90000^M a=fmtp:122 profile-level-id=24;object=23;bitrate=56000^M a=rtpmap:120 MP4A-LATM/90000^M a=fmtp:120 profile-level-id=24;object=23;bitrate=48000^M a=rtpmap:107 AAC_LC/32000^M a=rtpmap:113 G7221/16000^M a=fmtp:113 bitrate=32000^M a=rtpmap:112 G7221/16000^M a=fmtp:112 bitrate=24000^M a=rtpmap:9 G722/8000^M a=rtpmap:0 PCMU/8000^M a=rtpmap:8 PCMA/8000^M a=rtpmap:101 telephone-event/8000^M a=fmtp:101 0-15^M a=crypto:1 AES_CM_128_HMAC_SHA1_80 inline:7+vn2pJnWtzZOd1NbRHxbOA9PTXCcg7dYj/utO2Q UNENCRYPTED_SRTCP^M a=tcap:1 RTP/SAVP^M a=acap:1 crypto:1 AES_CM_128_HMAC_SHA1_80 inline:7+vn2pJnWtzZOd1NbRHxbOA9PTXCcg7dYj/utO2Q UNENCRYPTED_SRTCP^M a=pcfg:1 t=1 a=1^M a=ptime:20^M a=sendrecv^M m=video 3264 RTP/AVP 97 99 96 34^M b=TIAS:4096000^M a=content:main^M a=label:11^M a=rtpmap:97 H264/90000^M a=fmtp:97 profile-level-id=42801f;packetization-mode=0;max-br=10240;max-mbps=230500;max-fs=3840^M a=rtpmap:99 H264/90000^M a=fmtp:99 profile-level-id=64001f;packetization-mode=1;max-br=10240;max-mbps=230500;max-fs=3840^M a=rtpmap:96 H263-1998/90000^M a=fmtp:96 CUSTOM=1024,768,4;CUSTOM=800,600,3;CIF4=1;CUSTOM=704,480,1;CUSTOM=640,480,2;CIF=1;CUSTOM=352,240,1;QCIF=1;SQCIF=1^M a=rtpmap:34 H263/90000^M a=fmtp:34 CIF4=1;CIF=1;QCIF=1;SQCIF=1^M a=rtcp-fb:* nack pli^M a=rtcp-fb:* ccm fir^M a=crypto:1 AES_CM_128_HMAC_SHA1_80 inline:Bd177LcNUxHqLErHerfYayO5qGHua9P8SDU7Nukp UNENCRYPTED_SRTCP^M a=tcap:1 RTP/SAVP^M a=acap:1 crypto:1 AES_CM_128_HMAC_SHA1_80 inline:Bd177LcNUxHqLErHerfYayO5qGHua9P8SDU7Nukp UNENCRYPTED_SRTCP^M a=pcfg:1 t=1 a=1^M a=sendrecv^M m=application 3268 RTP/AVP 100^M a=rtpmap:100 H224/4800^M a=crypto:1 AES_CM_128_HMAC_SHA1_80 inline:4Jc05tgPoyY8cV+Wil5qWjaqTceSokflycOAJnpR UNENCRYPTED_SRTCP^M a=tcap:1 RTP/SAVP^M a=acap:1 crypto:1 AES_CM_128_HMAC_SHA1_80 inline:4Jc05tgPoyY8cV+Wil5qWjaqTceSokflycOAJnpR UNENCRYPTED_SRTCP^M a=pcfg:1 t=1 a=1^M a=sendrecv^M m=application 3268 RTP/AVP 100^M a=rtpmap:100 H224/4800^M a=crypto:1 AES_CM_128_HMAC_SHA1_80 inline:4Jc05tgPoyY8cV+Wil5qWjaqTceSokflycOAJnpR UNENCRYPTED_SRTCP^M a=tcap:1 RTP/SAVP^M a=acap:1 crypto:1 AES_CM_128_HMAC_SHA1_80 inline:4Jc05tgPoyY8cV+Wil5qWjaqTceSokflycOAJnpR UNENCRYPTED_SRTCP^M a=pcfg:1 t=1 a=1^M a=sendrecv^M m=application 3244 TCP/BFCP *^M c=IN IP4 10.100.10.135^M a=floorctrl:c-s^M a=confid:1^M a=userid:1^M a=floorid:2 mstrm:12^M a=setup:actpass^M a=connection:new^M

ACK sip:[field0]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 From: sip:[field0]@[field2];tag=[call_number] To: sip:[field1]@[field2][peer_tag_param] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: [cseq] ACK Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] [routes] Port: [$3] Content-Length: 0 Max-Forwards: 70

INVITE sip:[field0]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: sip:[field1]@[field3];tag=[call_number] To: sip:[field0]@[field2][peer_tag_param] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq:101 INVITE Contact: sip:sipp@[local_ip]:[local_port] Max-Forwards: 70 Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length: [len]

ACK [$1] SIP/2.0 From: sip:[field0]@[field2];tag=[call_number] To: sip:[field1]@[field2][peer_tag_param] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: [cseq] ACK Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] [routes] Port: [$3] Content-Length: 0 Max-Forwards: 70

BYE [$1] SIP/2.0 From: sip:[field0]@[field2];tag=[call_number] To: sip:[field1]@[field2][peer_tag_param] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: [cseq] BYE Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] [routes] Content-Length: 0 Max-Forwards: 70
